_instructions: Anardana — SCO 10 & 11, 1st Floor, Golf Avenue 42, Sector 42, DLF Phase 5, Gurugram.
Menu extracted from 5 menu page photos: Chaat, Small Plates/Appetizers, Large Plates/Pastas/Pizzas, Main Course, Biryani/Breads/Desserts.
Vegan [V] | Signature [आ] notations present on menu — dietary mapped accordingly.

restaurants.name: Anardana
restaurants.address: SCO 10 & 11, 1st Floor, Golf Avenue 42, Sector 42, DLF Phase 5, Gurugram

dishes.name: Bombay Sev Puri Tart
dishes.description: Crispy tart, boiled potato, pomegranate, ginger & imli chutney, spicy green chutney, topped with nylon sev.

dishes.name: Quinoa Gol Gappa
dishes.description: Golgappa with quinoa, pomegranate seeds, spicy chili guava & jaljeera water.

dishes.name: Palak & Kale Patta Chaat
dishes.description: Crispy baby spinach & kale leaves, flavored & sweetened yoghurt, imli chutney, sprinkled with house spice mix.

dishes.name: Ragda Chaat Ver 2.0
dishes.description: Street style ragda chaat with a modern twist and robust flavours.

dishes.name: Moradabadi Daal Chaat
dishes.description: Named after Prince Murad Baksh, Shah Jahan's son — it was accidentally created by a cook in Moradabad.

dishes.name: Avocado, Kale & Mexican Beans Salad
dishes.description: Avocado, kale leaves, Mexican beans, multigrain seeds with lime dressing.

dishes.name: Guacamole & Sour Dough Toast
dishes.description: Avocado salad served on toasted sour dough slices.

dishes.name: Yellow Beetroot, Roasted Peppers & Sour Dough Toast
dishes.description: Our take on chilli cheese toast with yellow beetroot and roasted peppers.

dishes.name: Beetroot Salad
dishes.description: Served with arugula & orange segment tossed in honey dressing.

dishes.name: Roast Tomato Dhaniya Shorba
dishes.description: Roasted tomato & garlic puree with crushed fresh coriander, served with namakpara crouton.

dishes.name: Mushroom Chai Truffle Essence Fondue
dishes.description: Hot broth of assorted mushrooms with a hint of truffle oil and parmesan fondue.

dishes.name: Murgh Badami Shorba
dishes.description: A rich & creamy chicken stock made with tender chicken pieces cooked in a velvety almond based broth.

dishes.name: Boursin Cheese Stuffed Hara Bhara Kebab
dishes.description: Hara bhara kebab stuffed with cheese mixed with assorted herbs.

dishes.name: Beetroot Shikampuri Kebab & Fennel Slaw
dishes.description: A beetroot patty stuffed with goat cheese & spicy filling, pistachio crust.

dishes.name: Edamame Seekh Kebab
dishes.description: Skewered mince of edamame beans, French beans, broccoli, apple, truffle mushroom oil & flavored with a blend of Indian spices.

dishes.name: Parmesan Malai Broccoli
dishes.description: Broccoli florets marinated in hung curd, sour cream & tandoori seasoning, served with shaved almonds & parmesan crisp.

dishes.name: Tangra Chilli Paneer
dishes.description: Stir fried chunks of cottage cheese tossed in a spicy sauce.

dishes.name: Mushroom Ki Galouti Kebab
dishes.description: Blend of smoked mushrooms with Awadh spices, served over varqi paratha.

dishes.name: Nut Crusted Multani Paneer Tikka
dishes.description: Paneer chunks stuffed with mint cheese & marinated with hung curd, spices and nuts, grilled in tandoor.

dishes.name: Ricotta Dahi Ke Kebab
dishes.description: Delicious hung curd & ricotta cheese based patties, infused with herbs & spices. Perfectly crisp on outside & soft on inside.

dishes.name: Pulled Jackfruit Mini Sliders
dishes.description: Pulled jackfruit in between mini sliders.

dishes.name: Lamb Neck Mini Sliders
dishes.description: Braised lamb neck in between mini sliders.

dishes.name: Sweet Shitake Thepla Tacos
dishes.description: Sweet shitake mushroom thepla tacos with smoked guacamole.

dishes.name: Prawn Thepla Tacos
dishes.description: Prawn thepla tacos with smoked guacamole.

dishes.name: Caramel Chicken Slider
dishes.description: Grilled chicken cooked with miso served on sour dough & topped with melted cheddar.

dishes.name: Murgh Malai Tikka
dishes.description: Char-grilled yet creamy & tender chicken pieces marinated in hung curd, cream, cardamom & Indian spices.

dishes.name: Black Garlic Chicken Tikka
dishes.description: Chicken morsels marinated with aged garlic, curd & spices, grilled in tandoor.

dishes.name: Chilli Chicken Ver 2.0
dishes.description: Stir fried chunks of chicken tossed in a spicy sauce.

dishes.name: Anardana Chicken Tikka Scotch Flambeed
dishes.description: Char-grilled chicken pieces marinated in hung curd, Kashmiri chili & spices, flambeed with scotch.

dishes.name: Chotemiyan Seekh Kebab
dishes.description: Char-grilled mutton skewers, mixed with Persian spice mix, green chili, garlic, served with fermented batter.

dishes.name: Lamb Galouti
dishes.description: Melt in mouth texture minced lamb patties, mixed with spices & herbs, grilled on tawa, served on varqi paratha.

dishes.name: Kolkata Bekti Varuval
dishes.description: A traditional Indian speciality fish dish marinated with robust spices.

dishes.name: Pepperfry Lamb Chops
dishes.description: Mangalorean delicacy lamb chops — it's a must try.

dishes.name: Awadhi Fish Tikka
dishes.description: Char-grilled fish chunks, marinated with hung curd, mustard oil, lemon juice & coarse homemade spices.

dishes.name: Ajwaini Tiger Prawns
dishes.description: Prawns marinated with ajwain & spices grilled in tandoor.

dishes.name: Sikandari Raan
dishes.description: A discovery from The Great Alexander's era — whole leg of lamb slow-roasted with aromatic spices.

dishes.name: Mix Vegetable Momos
dishes.description: Dumplings filled with a flavorful blend of assorted vegetables & served with spicy dipping sauce. Available steamed, fried or tandoori.

dishes.name: Spicy Chicken Momos
dishes.description: Dumpling filled with spicy chicken, chili & garlic mixed with house spice blend & served with spicy dipping sauce.

dishes.name: Hummus Platter
dishes.description: Assortment of plain, coriander & beetroot hummus with pickled salad, accompanied with lavash, falafel, squash cream, couscous & pita bread.

dishes.name: Bhara-Bhara Veg Kebab Platter
dishes.description: Medley of ricotta dahi kebab, edamame seekh kebab, makhani paneer tikka, mushroom galouti.

dishes.name: Gabber Singh Non-Vegetarian Platter
dishes.description: Black garlic chicken tikka, anardana chicken tikka, chotemiyan seekh kebab, Awadhi fish tikka.

dishes.name: Lotus Stem in Bloody Mary Sauce
dishes.description: Crispy lotus stem tossed in a tangy Bloody Mary-style sauce.

dishes.name: Papad Sampler
dishes.description: Assorted papads served with chutneys.

dishes.name: Plain Salted Fries
dishes.description: Classic salted fries — also available as Peri Peri Fries.

dishes.name: Pull Apart Garlic Bread
dishes.description: Soft pull-apart bread infused with garlic butter.

dishes.name: Rustic Margherita Pizza
dishes.description: Classic pizza of Naples with cherry tomato, mozzarella cheese and fresh basil.

dishes.name: Ortolana Garden Pizza
dishes.description: Sliced mushrooms & courgettes, julienne peppers, cherry tomatoes, red onions with mozzarella cheese.

dishes.name: Chicken & Jalapeno Pizza
dishes.description: Diced peppery chicken, jalapenos, cherry tomato with mozzarella cheese.

dishes.name: Penne Arrabbiata
dishes.description: Pasta cooked in red sauce made with tomatoes, assorted vegetables, olive oil, garlic, red chili & bell peppers with parmesan cheese. Available with chicken.

dishes.name: Penne Alfredo
dishes.description: Pasta tossed in bechamel sauce made with sauteed mushroom, olive oil with parmesan cheese. Available with chicken.

dishes.name: Penne Rose Sauce
dishes.description: Pasta tossed in cream cheese & arrabbiata sauce with assorted vegetables. Available with chicken.

dishes.name: Nizami Diwani Handi
dishes.description: Assorted handpicked vegetables simmered into Chef's special handi masala.

dishes.name: Mushroom Hara Pyaaz Masala
dishes.description: Mushroom & scallions cooked with masala gravy.

dishes.name: Anardana Malai Kofta
dishes.description: Stuffed cottage cheese dumpling cooked in smooth rich gravy.

dishes.name: Anardana Shahi Paneer
dishes.description: Cottage cheese chunks cooked with rich tomato & cashew nut gravy.

dishes.name: Paneer Tikka Butter Masala
dishes.description: Grilled cottage cheese chunks cooked in chop masala gravy.

dishes.name: Anardana Chana Masala
dishes.description: Chickpeas cooked in Indian spices & dried pomegranate seeds.

dishes.name: Lehsooni Palak Chenna
dishes.description: Spinach cooked with mashed paneer and garlic, creamy & rich in taste.

dishes.name: Assorted Vegetables Peruvian Sauce
dishes.description: Cooked in sweet & sour peruvian sauce accompanied with sushi rice.

dishes.name: Punjabi Dal Tadka
dishes.description: Yellow lentils flavored with cumin & tomato, finished with white butter.

dishes.name: Gongura Khichdi
dishes.description: Signature khichdi with gongura leaves, black garlic & khakra.

dishes.name: Dal Makhani
dishes.description: Black urad lentils simmered in creamy gravy sauteed with tomato puree & mild spices.

dishes.name: Hakka Noodles
dishes.description: Stir fried noodles with assorted vegetables & soy sauce. Available with chicken.

dishes.name: Chilli Garlic Noodles
dishes.description: Noodles wok-tossed with garlic, chilli & soy sauce. Available with chicken.

dishes.name: Cottage Cheese In Soy Chilli Sauce
dishes.description: Cottage cheese chunks wok tossed with assorted pepper & soy chilli sauce.

dishes.name: Malabar Chicken Curry
dishes.description: Bone-in chicken cooked in South Indian style with coconut and aromatic spices.

dishes.name: Anardana Special Butter Chicken
dishes.description: Boneless chicken cooked in rich tomato gravy with cream, cashew nut paste, dollop of butter & fenugreek powder.

dishes.name: Chicken Changezi
dishes.description: Roasted boneless chicken cooked in rich gravy with cream, ginger garlic paste, tomatoes & chef special blended spices.

dishes.name: Royal Kipti Murgh
dishes.description: Char-grilled chicken tikka egg roll with cashew & makhani gravy on one side & spinach gravy on the other side.

dishes.name: Chicken In Hot Garlic Sauce
dishes.description: Chicken chunks & assorted vegetables wok-tossed in hot garlic sauce.

dishes.name: Mutton Rogan Josh
dishes.description: A traditional Kashmiri style mutton dish with whole spices and deep flavours.

dishes.name: Awadhi Nalli Nihari
dishes.description: Heritage Mughlai delicacy where lamb shanks are cooked with selected spices on slow heat to reach the level of perfection.

dishes.name: Prawn & Fish Thai Mango Curry
dishes.description: Coconut flavoured Thai mango curry — available with prawn or fish.

dishes.description: Long grain basmati cooked on dum with choice vegetables, served with burani raita & Hyderabadi salan.

dishes.description: Long grain basmati cooked on dum with chicken, served with burani raita & Hyderabadi salan.

dishes.description: Long grain basmati cooked on dum with mutton, served with burani raita & Hyderabadi salan.

dishes.name: Raan Biryani

dishes.description: Basmati rice tempered with cumin seeds.

dishes.name: Raita

dishes.description: Soft, layered Malabari-style paratha.

dishes.description: Fine flour bread cooked in tandoor.

dishes.name: Butter Naan
dishes.description: Fine flour bread cooked in tandoor, finished with butter.

dishes.name: Laccha Paratha
dishes.description: Multi-layered wheat flour bread. Also available as Pudina Paratha or Hari Mirch Paratha.

dishes.description: Naan topped with garlic and fresh coriander, baked in tandoor.

dishes.name: Bharwan Kulcha
